---
title: "Treasures in the Marshes, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of ‘The Cross Roads’ ‘The Constable’s Tower’ etc."
---

## Treasures in the Marshes, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of ‘The Cross Roads’ ‘The Constable’s Tower’ etc.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** n.d. [September 1893]
**Genre:** Fiction
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London: National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, Westminster, New York: Thomas Whittaker, 2 & 3 Bible House.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
